{"step_by_step_thinking": "The definition of a placebo is a sham medical intervention that causes improvement in a patient's condition due to the patient's perception of the intervention. Among the options, only sham surgery fits this description as it is a fake surgical procedure that does not involve any actual medical treatment but can still produce a placebo effect. Herbal medication with no known effect, physiotherapy, and cognitive behavioral therapy do not fit the definition of a placebo.", "answer_choice": "C"}
